accepted_class_exceptions.exception_reason: SQLite migration ownership is intentionally centralized to avoid untested schema drift.
accepted_class_exceptions.owner_note: DB schema behavior must not change in this cleanup pass.
accepted_class_exceptions.revisit_condition: Revisit only with explicit migration tests and backup/restore verification.

accepted_class_exceptions.exception_reason: Signal persistence methods share schema assumptions, row serialization, and outcome lookup behavior.
accepted_class_exceptions.owner_note: Avoid splitting storage write paths without SQLite roundtrip parity tests.
accepted_class_exceptions.revisit_condition: Revisit when storage schema v2 or a repository layer is introduced.

accepted_class_exceptions.exception_reason: Watchlist persistence methods are stable DB helpers and only slightly exceed the advisory limit.
accepted_class_exceptions.owner_note: No DB schema or paper/watchlist behavior changes in this refactor pass.
accepted_class_exceptions.revisit_condition: Revisit when watchlist storage grows new tables or migrations.

accepted_production_files_over_1200_line.reason: Static shim registry/data table; large by design and non-behavioral.
accepted_production_files_over_1200_line.revisit_condition: When another shim retirement pass removes retained public compatibility entries.

accepted_production_files_over_1200_line.reason: Integrated radar merge policy is behavior-critical and close to the blocker threshold but unchanged.
accepted_production_files_over_1200_line.revisit_condition: When identity/source/market/derivatives merge golden fixtures can be compared before and after split.

accepted_production_files_over_1200_line.reason: Dense operator audit renderer with many cross-section helper dependencies.
accepted_production_files_over_1200_line.revisit_condition: When audit sections are split with golden Markdown fixture comparison.

accepted_production_files_over_1200_line.reason: Verdict scoring and live-confirmation policy share many ordered caps and guardrails.
accepted_production_files_over_1200_line.revisit_condition: When verdict snapshots cover each opportunity level and cap reason.

accepted_production_files_over_1200_line.reason: Legacy CLI report compatibility binder with broad scanner-service monkeypatch expectations.
accepted_production_files_over_1200_line.revisit_condition: When config/report command bodies move to canonical non-legacy service modules.

accepted_production_files_over_1200_line.reason: Route-gate decision logic is dense and behavior-critical for no-send notification eligibility.
accepted_production_files_over_1200_line.revisit_condition: When route-decision/gate snapshots cover every lane and quality-gate cap.

accepted_production_files_over_1200_line.reason: Central environment/config contract; splitting risks import-time default and env-var behavior drift.
accepted_production_files_over_1200_line.revisit_condition: When a dedicated config-v2 migration freeze and env snapshot tests exist.

accepted_production_files_over_1200_line.reason: Provider/cache enrichment flow is stable and below blocker threshold.
accepted_production_files_over_1200_line.revisit_condition: When adding a new enrichment source or cache policy.

accepted_production_files_over_1200_line.reason: Legacy notification-plan compatibility core; no-send semantics are more important than churn.
accepted_production_files_over_1200_line.revisit_condition: When notification plan rows are covered by schema-level golden fixtures.

accepted_production_files_over_1200_line.reason: Deterministic derivatives crowding evaluator with tightly coupled fixture smoke coverage.
accepted_production_files_over_1200_line.revisit_condition: When adding a new derivatives metric family or crowding class.

accepted_production_files_over_1200_line.reason: Outcome maturation/report code is stable and below the blocker threshold.
accepted_production_files_over_1200_line.revisit_condition: When outcome performance views gain new sections.

accepted_production_files_over_1200_line.reason: Stable argparse flag bundle; splitting individual flag groups risks CLI default drift.
accepted_production_files_over_1200_line.revisit_condition: Next parser feature addition or when event-alpha flag groups can be snapshot-tested per submodule.

deleted_shims_sample.removal_reason: Non-public active shim with zero internal, Makefile, script, dynamic, and artifact-doc references; only the dedicated legacy compatibility test referenced it before this pass.
deleted_shims_sample.verification_command: make event-alpha-shim-dependency-report PYTHON=python3; make event-alpha-old-import-check PYTHON=python3; python3 tests/test_indicators.py; PYTEST_DISABLE_PLUGIN_AUTOLOAD=1 python3 -m pytest tests/event_alpha tests/rsi tests/cli tests/test_indicators.py -q; python3 -m compileall -q crypto_rsi_scanner tests; make event-alpha-integrated-radar-smoke PYTHON=python3; make event-alpha-integrated-radar-doctor PYTHON=python3; make verify PYTHON=python3

rows.exception_reason: SQLite migration ownership is intentionally centralized to avoid untested schema drift.
rows.owner_note: DB schema behavior must not change in this cleanup pass.
rows.revisit_condition: Revisit only with explicit migration tests and backup/restore verification.

rows.exception_reason: Signal persistence methods share schema assumptions, row serialization, and outcome lookup behavior.
rows.owner_note: Avoid splitting storage write paths without SQLite roundtrip parity tests.
rows.revisit_condition: Revisit when storage schema v2 or a repository layer is introduced.

rows.exception_reason: Watchlist persistence methods are stable DB helpers and only slightly exceed the advisory limit.
rows.owner_note: No DB schema or paper/watchlist behavior changes in this refactor pass.
rows.revisit_condition: Revisit when watchlist storage grows new tables or migrations.

production_files_over_1200_lines.reason: accepted/documented production files over the v3 1,200-line target

rows.reason: Integrated radar merge policy is behavior-critical and close to the blocker threshold but unchanged.
rows.revisit_condition: When identity/source/market/derivatives merge golden fixtures can be compared before and after split.

rows.reason: Static shim registry/data table; large by design and non-behavioral.
rows.revisit_condition: When another shim retirement pass removes retained public compatibility entries.

rows.reason: Dense operator audit renderer with many cross-section helper dependencies.
rows.revisit_condition: When audit sections are split with golden Markdown fixture comparison.

rows.reason: Verdict scoring and live-confirmation policy share many ordered caps and guardrails.
rows.revisit_condition: When verdict snapshots cover each opportunity level and cap reason.

rows.reason: Legacy CLI report compatibility binder with broad scanner-service monkeypatch expectations.
rows.revisit_condition: When config/report command bodies move to canonical non-legacy service modules.

rows.reason: Route-gate decision logic is dense and behavior-critical for no-send notification eligibility.
rows.revisit_condition: When route-decision/gate snapshots cover every lane and quality-gate cap.

rows.reason: Central environment/config contract; splitting risks import-time default and env-var behavior drift.
rows.revisit_condition: When a dedicated config-v2 migration freeze and env snapshot tests exist.

rows.reason: Provider/cache enrichment flow is stable and below blocker threshold.
rows.revisit_condition: When adding a new enrichment source or cache policy.

rows.reason: Legacy notification-plan compatibility core; no-send semantics are more important than churn.
rows.revisit_condition: When notification plan rows are covered by schema-level golden fixtures.

rows.reason: Deterministic derivatives crowding evaluator with tightly coupled fixture smoke coverage.
rows.revisit_condition: When adding a new derivatives metric family or crowding class.

rows.reason: Outcome maturation/report code is stable and below the blocker threshold.
rows.revisit_condition: When outcome performance views gain new sections.

rows.reason: Stable argparse flag bundle; splitting individual flag groups risks CLI default drift.
rows.revisit_condition: Next parser feature addition or when event-alpha flag groups can be snapshot-tested per submodule.

retained_public_shims.expected_lifetime: Retain through the v3 public compatibility period; revisit only in a documented v4/deprecation release.
retained_public_shims.owner_note: New code must import crypto_rsi_scanner.event_alpha.artifacts.context. Keep the old module as an active shim only; deletion requires an accepted compatibility-breaking decision and updated compatibility tests.
retained_public_shims.reason: Historical artifact-context helper import path retained for external scripts, older operator snippets, and public import compatibility.
